checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Claude implemented first inside exact scope; Codex audited and recorded two focused gate corrections.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: Provider-neutral CI, inherited provider-workflow removal, authorization, validator, tests, docs, runtime evidence, PR, and passing checks are present.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: High-risk workflow paths are explicitly authorized; no blocked secret, dependency, production, deployment, billing, auth, database, force-push, or unlisted workflow operation occurred.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: New workflows use contents read, no provider action or API-key secret, and both execute the existing security gate.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Every changed or deleted file is listed in the issue #1 scope manifest.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: 128 local tests pass; contract, scope, authority, security, review, and whitespace checks pass.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: unique-ai-ci, validate-foundation, review-gate, and generate-pr-review-report passed on PR #2 after the focused CI fix.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The report distinguishes ready-for-merge state from pending merge, branch protection, issue closure, and deployment.

findings.evidence: Main protection cannot require the new check until it has been observed and merged.
findings.recommendation: After merge, require unique-ai-ci with strict checks, admin enforcement, force-push disabled, and deletion disabled.

unresolved_risks: Branch protection and issue closure remain required post-merge steps.
